betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Chisel§f

§aRadically expand your construction palette and design breathtaking industrial bases!§f
The §9Chisel§f mod is a builder's dream, giving you access to thousands of custom-textured decorative variants for everyday building blocks like factory plates, laboratory walls, concrete, metals, stone, and wood. Perfect for keeping your high-tech complexes looking clean, structured, and immersive.

§6Chisel Tools & Durability§f:
§b• Iron Chisel§f: Perfect for starting out. Allows single-block chiseling and can left-click block surfaces to change them directly. Max durability is §c512 uses§f (inflicts §c2 half-hearts§f of damage). Does not support advanced mode changes.
§b• Diamond Chisel§f: Built for massive scale projects. Supports advanced chiseling modes (such as 1×1, 3×3, column, or panel mapping) and features a massive §a5,056 durability§f (inflicts §c3 half-hearts§f of damage).
§b• iChisel§f: The high-tech pinnacle of aesthetic styling. Retains all advanced chiseling modes, includes additional GUI features, and boasts an extraordinary §a10,048 durability§f (inflicts §c3 half-hearts§f of damage).

§6Block Mechanics & Interactions§f:
§b• Velocity Concrete§f: Laying down white concrete blocks provides a passive mobility boost! Walking on them multiplies your speed by §a1.35×§f — perfect for long factory hallways and road layouts.
§b• Connected Textures (CTM)§f: Many blocks (like factory vents, fan blocks, and laboratory panels) seamlessly blend their textures together when placed side-by-side, creating large, unified sheets.
§b• Auto Chisel§f: Automate the aesthetic process. The §9Auto Chisel§f can run without power, but feeding it §cForge Energy (FE)§f allows it to operate at significantly accelerated speeds.
§b• Refining Shortcuts§f: Skip the crafting grid and furnace. You can directly chisel raw §bStone§f into §bStone Bricks§f, and stone bricks directly into §bMossy Stone Bricks§f.

§6How to Refine Your Decor§f:
1. §bCraft a Chisel§f: Start with a basic Iron Chisel using a single stick and an iron ingot.
2. §bOpen the Chiseling Interface§f: §9Right-click§f with the chisel in the air to open its GUI. Place a block in the central slot and select a beautiful new design from the surrounding choices.
3. §bFast Roadways§f: Lay down white concrete paths inside your main machinery hallways to utilize the §a1.35× speed multiplier§f for faster movement across your base.
